_meta.keyKnowledge: We experiment with, develop and refine dance elements, physical and expressive skills, and style-specific techniques to communicate meaning while maintaining safe practice.

_source.w: We experiment with, develop and refine dance elements, physical and expressive skills, and style-specific techniques to communicate meaning while maintaining safe practice.
y: At this level, our technical and expressive skills become powerful tools for artistic communication.
Safe practice remains critical as the physical demands of our dance work increase.
Experimentation with technique and expression is how we develop our unique artistic voice.
eg: We refine our technique in specific dance styles through focused, sustained practice.
We experiment with how variations in quality, dynamics and timing affect meaning.
We develop strength, flexibility and endurance appropriate to the styles we are studying.
We apply principles of anatomy and biomechanics to maintain safe dance practice.
We push our expressive range by exploring unfamiliar movement qualities and dynamics.
We document our technical development and set goals for continued improvement.
